name: Tax-Free Transfer of Bulk Natural Wine

eligibility.description: Applies to importers of natural wine (as defined in § 5381) who transfer the product in bulk containers directly to the premises of a bonded wine cellar.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows natural wine imported in bulk to be withdrawn from customs and transferred to a bonded wine cellar without immediate payment of internal revenue tax.
